heroSubtitle: Easel gives you real-time insight into her cycle so you always know how to show up — even when she can't explain it.
benefitEyeDesc: See exactly where she is in her cycle — before emotions run high.
benefitZapTitle: Know what to do, every day
benefitZapDesc: Get AI-personalized tips on how to show up based on her exact phase.
benefitBellDesc: She can send you a quiet signal when she needs support — no awkward conversations.
benefitHeartDesc: Understanding her cycle turns friction into empathy — automatically.
codeHint: Ask your partner to open Easel and share her 6-character code with you.
inviteMessage: I'm using Easel to understand and support you better. Download it and let's connect: https://easel.app
errorExpired: This code has expired. Ask her to generate a new one.
errorAlreadyUsed: This code has already been used.
errorOwnCode: That's your own code — enter her code instead.
errorInvalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
